o encontrarse dentro de los próximos 30 días ({{frm_cot_fecha_inicio_vigencia_maxima}})

Por favor, revise la información e intente nuevamente.

GetRecord.description: Collection get record by record id
Collection get record by record id

scripts.title: DocuSign Get Tokens
scripts.code:
<?php
$docusignServer = getenv('docusign_server');
$integrationKey = getenv('docusign_integration_key');
$secretKey = getenv('docusign_secret_key');
$code = $data['code'];
$authorization = base64_encode("{$integrationKey}:{$secretKey}");

$curl = curl_init();
curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignServer}/oauth/token",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => "code={$code}&grant_type=authorization_code",
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    "Authorization: Basic {$authorization}",
    'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
  ),
));
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

$docusign = json_decode($response, true);

// Get DocuSign User Account information
$curl = curl_init();
curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignServer}/oauth/userinfo",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Authorization: Bearer ' . $docusign['access_token'],
    'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
  ),
));
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);
$userInfo = json_decode($response, true);
$docusign['user'] = $userInfo;

return compact('docusign');
